intent: Pin the ranking projection contract: Top 3 / Top 10 / Full are slices of the artifact-declared order, never re-ranked. The active universe is canonical; non-active labels are excluded with bookkeeping.

cases.description: Priority artifact lists only 2 systems; ranking_universe contains 26.
cases.expected_outcome: full list still includes all 26; the 24 missing systems carry rank=null and trust_state='unknown_signal'; missing_from_priority enumerates them.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by ranking.test.ts:'full list contains every active system; missing systems appear with rank=null'

cases.description: Priority artifact contains H01 (forbidden), ABX (future), HNX (deprecated).
cases.expected_outcome: all three appear in excluded_from_priority; none appear in top_3 / top_10 / full.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by ranking.test.ts:'excludes non-active ids (H01, ABX, HNX) and reports them'

cases.description: Verify Top 3 ordering equals the first 3 entries of the artifact's global_ranked_systems list (no re-ranking, no score recomputation).
cases.expected_outcome: top_3 == artifact rows in order; top_10 prefix equals top_3.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by ranking.test.ts:'preserves artifact ordering — never re-ranks' and 'Top 10 is a slice of artifact-present rows; Top 3 is its prefix'

cases.description: Confirm no synthetic system_ids leak into Top 3 / Top 10 / full when the artifact is missing entirely.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by ranking.test.ts:'returns empty projection when priority artifact is missing'

cases.description: Priority artifact has empty global_ranked_systems but populated top_5.
cases.expected_outcome: fall back to top_5 with explicit warning; never invent rows.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by ranking.test.ts:'falls back to top_5 when global_ranked_systems is empty'

fixes_applied.rationale: Single helper that produces Top 3 / Top 10 / Full from the artifact + contract. Forbids re-ranking; missing-from-priority systems become rank=null tail entries.
Persists artifacts/tls/d3l_ranking_report.json so the projection is reviewable as a governed artifact and red-team can compare against the live dashboard.
